name: doc-curate
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: nielsen-norman |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: INVENTORY_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: How broad the lifecycle inventory and cleanup judgement should be.

required_inputs.name: DECISION_MODE
required_inputs.description: How readily delete or deprecate actions may be recommended. Defaults to `conservative` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: CANONICAL_SURFACES
required_inputs.description: Docs that define the maintained public surface and should be favored when deduplicating or redirecting content.
